title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited:
Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited!
